title: Questions from Quarantine: Contact Tracing Basics
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine . _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: This article introduces a weekly web series titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' hosted by Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. The series aims to address public inquiries related to the COVID-19 pandemic, offering advice on maintaining mental and physical well-being during the global crisis. A specific episode focuses on the basics of contact tracing, a critical public health tool for disease containment. The article encourages audience participation by inviting questions via social media using the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. It is presented as part of the Security and Global Health Project's efforts to disseminate expert knowledge. The content is promotional, highlighting the series' schedule and its relevance to topics like coronavirus, global health, and science & technology policy.
result.main_content_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为“隔离问题”的每周网络系列节目，由朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持。该系列旨在解答公众在COVID-19大流行期间提出的问题，就如何在全球危机中保持身心健康提供建议。其中一期节目专门讲解了接触者追踪的基础知识，这是疾病控制的关键公共卫生工具。文章鼓励观众通过社交媒体使用#QuestionsFromQuarantine标签提问，促进公众参与。该系列是“安全与全球健康项目”传播专家知识工作的一部分。内容具有宣传性质，强调了节目的播出时间表及其与冠状病毒、全球健康、科技政策等主题的相关性。
